headline: UFP Industries, Sherwin-Williams, and Vulcan Materials Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened fresh strikes, sending crude sharply higher and bond yields up in a broad inflation-driven selloff.

headline: Sherwin Williams (SHW) In Focus As Cost Cutting Narrative Meets Valuation Questions
summary: Sherwin-Williams event: what the Square partnership and index removal mean for investors Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has had two fresh developments: selection of Square as a payment partner for its PRO+ Digital Alliance Program and removal from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index. Together, these moves touch both how Sherwin-Williams supports professional customers and how some index-linked investors may gain or lose exposure to the stock. See our latest analysis for Sherwin-Williams. At a share price...
